pageTitle: Stain Strike | Couch and Rug Cleaning That Actually Removes Stains
metaDescription: Fabric couch and rug cleaning with real stain removal. No leather. Fast bookings via WhatsApp. Serving Alberton, Germiston, Boksburg, Bedfordview, Edenvale, Kempton Park, Johannesburg South, Randburg. Free quote.
h1: Stain Strike: couch and rug cleaning that removes stains (fabric only, no leather).
heroSub: Deep extraction for couches and rugs, stain-focused pretreatment, and fast dry times. Send photos on WhatsApp for an exact quote.
metaList: Couches | Rugs | Stain removal | Odour add-ons
painPoints: Stains keep coming back after a quick steam

Leather gets treated like fabric (and gets damaged)
offerBullets: Fabric couch and rug cleaning (no leather)

faq.a: No. We only clean fabric upholstery and rugs.
No honest operator promises that. We will tell you the probability after photos; most organic stains improve dramatically.
Typically a few hours; ventilation speeds it up.
Light items yes; heavy items by request.

faq.q: What do you need from me?
faq.a: Access to water and a plug point, and parking close by.
